title: Elevated Expeditions
description:
🚀 Elevated Expeditions: Unleash the Minecraft 2.0 Adventure! 🌟

🌍 Embark on an incredible journey with our carefully curated modpack, Elevated Expeditions, where the possibilities are limitless.
body:
# 🚀 Elevated Expeditions
##  Unleash the Minecraft 2.0 Adventure! 🌟

🌍 Embark on an incredible journey with our carefully curated modpack, **Elevated Expeditions**, where the possibilities are limitless. Built upon the foundation of **Better Adventure Plus**, our mods take the gameplay to extraordinary heights, making the base modpack feel *bland* in comparison. Experience the captivating essence of **Minecraft 2.0** as you delve into a world filled with exhilarating features and quality-of-life enhancements.


## Versions 
Multiple versions coming:
- **Beta**: mods you will need if you want to join the SMP, no need to install server side mods.
- **Release**: singleplayer mods, you will have everything you need to play solo, including the server-sided mods you'll need to experience what it's like to play on our server.

## Our SMP (closed for now due to financial issues)

🌟 Explore the amazing features of our server:
- **Vanilla-like experience with enhanced gameplay**: Our handpicked mods add new dimensions to the gameplay while preserving the essence of Minecraft.
- **No pay-to-win**: We ensure a fair and balanced playing field for everyone.
- **Grief-free environment**: Any acts of grief will be swiftly rolled back and punished.
- **PvP (if consented to)**: Engage in thrilling battles and competition with others.
- **Player-driven mod selection**: We listen to your input and welcome mod requests to continuously enhance your adventure.
- **Open to all**: We welcome players of all backgrounds, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, or financial circumstances.
- **Friendly community**: Join our welcoming community and make new friends on your epic journey.
- **Voice chat**: Don't have a mic or maybe you're a bit shy to go on the discord voice chat? No problem :)

Adventure awaits! Join us now on [Discord](https://discord.gg/MHFnMsH8Ax) and let's create unforgettable memories together in the world of Elevated Expeditions. 🌌



--- 
Credit to the incredible mods authors and to
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
